name: The Golf Suite
about: The Golf Suite is a 24/7 indoor golf facility located in the Dallas/Addison area, featuring one private bay equipped with Foresight Sports Simulator technology. It provides a flexible environment for golfers to play on over 500 courses, practice privately, or receive PGA instruction. The facility operates on a membership or pay-as-you-go model, with no initiation fees or yearly commitments, and offers 24/7 online booking access to accommodate busy schedules.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access allows practicing around any schedule
Private bay ensures a distraction-free environment
Foresight Sports technology provides accurate ball and club tracking
No initiation fees or yearly commitments offer flexible payment options
PGA instruction available for all skill levels

simulator_hardware.notes: Uses infrared object tracking and high-speed, high-resolution camera-based technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if clubs are provided. It's recommended to bring your own equipment for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service on-site, suggesting it may be a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) facility, but this is not explicitly confirmed.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for an 18-hole round. Duration would depend on the course and player pace.

faq.question: Is The Golf Suite kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information about child-friendly features or policies. The facility may be suitable for older juniors with adult supervision.
